channels._comment: Uncomment and fill in to enable Telegram alerts
Uncomment and fill in to enable email alerts
Uncomment to send to Slack/Discord webhook

_comments.safety: Every check ships in 'alert' mode. Nothing is auto-fixed by default.
_comments.disk_auto: Set mode to 'auto' only after you trust cleanup_globs. The agent deletes regular files older than cleanup_older_than_days inside those globs only — never directories, never symlinks, never system paths.
_comments.service_auto: Set mode to 'auto' to let the agent restart a failed service. Use 'ask' to approve each restart.
_comments.process_auto: Set mode to 'auto' AND populate kill_allowed_names to let the agent kill runaway processes. Safety gates verify kill_eligible, PID existence, and name match before any signal is sent. Never kills PID 1 or names in never_kill.
_comments.ssh_auto: Set mode to 'auto' to block brute-forcing IPs via iptables. Requires root/CAP_NET_ADMIN. Blocks expire after block_duration_seconds (0 = permanent).
_comments.dashboard: Set dashboard.enabled to true to start the web UI on 127.0.0.1:8765. Bind to 0.0.0.0 only behind a firewall.
_comments.federation_spoke: Set federation.enabled true, mode 'spoke', hub_url to push state to a hub agent.
_comments.federation_hub: Set mode 'hub' on one agent to receive heartbeats from all spokes and serve /fleet/agents.
